english: Who is the current Prime Minister of India?
hindi: भारत के वर्तमान प्रधानमंत्री कौन हैं?
vietnamese: Ai là Thủ tướng Ấn Độ hiện tại?
correct_answer: The current Prime Minister of India is Narendra Modi. He has been in office since 2014.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question if it hallucinates a different prime minister, refuses to answer due to lack of up-to-date information, or provides a factual error about the current prime minister.
